[Warn] g3rs-hooks/clippy-denies-warnings .githooks/pre-commit missing deny-warnings `cargo clippy` command in `.githooks/pre-commit`
  Add a real clippy command such as `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` to `.githooks/pre-commit`. Put it with the other Rust cargo checks so the hook fails on any clippy warning, not only on hard errors.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/cargo-dupes-excludes .githooks/pre-commit missing `--exclude-tests` on `cargo dupes` in `.githooks/pre-commit`
  Change the `cargo dupes` command in `.githooks/pre-commit` to `cargo dupes --exclude-tests`. This keeps the duplication check focused on real workspace dependency versions instead of test-only crates.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/routing-scope-not-hardcoded-literal .githooks/pre-commit verifier scope not hardcoded
  .githooks/pre-commit invokes the Rust verifier with a discovery loop variable.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/routing-no-env-override .githooks/pre-commit no env-override routing
  .githooks/pre-commit does not use environment-override routing.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/routing-no-upward-walk-from-units .githooks/pre-commit no ancestor expansion of discovered units
  .githooks/pre-commit does not call the Rust verifier on ancestor adopted units.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/routing-discovers-marker-pair .githooks/pre-commit marker pair discovery present
  .githooks/pre-commit tests for both `Cargo.toml` and sibling `guardrail3-rs.toml` to identify owning adopted units.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/routing-staged-files-diff-filter-acm .githooks/pre-commit staged-file collection uses --diff-filter=ACM
  .githooks/pre-commit collects staged files with `git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM`.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/calls-validate-repo .githooks/pre-commit hook calls g3rs validate-repo
  .githooks/pre-commit invokes `g3rs validate-repo` for repo-level invariants.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/dispatches-per-unit-validate-staged .githooks/pre-commit hook dispatches per-unit g3rs validate --staged
  .githooks/pre-commit invokes `g3rs validate --path <unit> --staged` from a discovery loop.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/dedups-owning-units .githooks/pre-commit hook dedups owning units
  .githooks/pre-commit dedups owning units before invoking `g3rs validate`.
[Warn] g3rs-hooks/skips-when-no-owning-unit .githooks/pre-commit hook skips silently when no owning unit
  .githooks/pre-commit gates the per-unit Rust validate on having discovered an owning adopted unit.
[Error] g3rs-hooks/no-toolchain-invocation .githooks/pre-commit hook invokes cargo directly
  `.githooks/pre-commit` invokes `cargo metadata --locked --format-version 1` directly. The hook must delegate all cargo work to `g3rs validate --path <unit> --staged`; no direct `cargo` invocations are allowed.
[Error] g3rs-hooks/contract-trigger-coverage .githooks/pre-commit hook contract trigger coverage missing
  `.githooks/pre-commit`'s `RUST_RELEVANT_PATTERN` does not match these family-owned exact trigger paths: .cargo/config, .cargo/config.toml, .clippy.toml, .rustfmt.toml, README.md, Readme.md, cliff.toml, clippy.toml, deny.toml, readme.md, release-plz.toml, rust-toolchain.toml, rustfmt.toml. Either add an alternative for each missing path to the pattern, or remove the trigger from the family hook contract.

  `.githooks/pre-commit` enables `set -e`-style shell error handling before running checks.
